text:
Once upon a time, in a quiet seaside town named Serenade, there was an old piano neglected in Mrs. Jenkins' attic. Every Christmas season, Mrs. Jenkins would play it softly while decorating the porch light. Despite its old keys, it became a cherished favorite.

One foggy evening, while wandering the quiet beach looking for something to enjoy, little Timmy noticed the piano. It was leaning dangerously to one side. He decided to rescue it. With Mom's urging and a few tools, Timmy put it back upright.

Back home, they practiced together — Timmy's awkward little fingers pressing the keys, Mrs. Jenkins humming along. They played Christmas carols, turning the attic into a cozy melody hall filled with warmth.

Soon, Serenade transformed into a small festival celebrating Christmas. People would drift into the attic listening to their little piano hero. There were caroler floats, homemade cookies, and even a light-hearted reindeer parade. Every corner had a cheerful tune emanating
